Dictionary of National Biography, Volumes 1-22 for Richard Basset
Marsworth Domesday
memoryArtifacts.description:
Land of Robert d'Oilly
Households 
Households: 22 villagers. 8 slaves.
Land and resources 
Ploughland: 9 ploughlands. 4 lord's plough teams. 5 men's plough teams.
Other resources: Meadow 6 ploughs. Woodland 800 pigs. 3 mills, value 15 shillings.
Valuation 
Annual value to lord: 20 pounds in 1086; 20 pounds when acquired by the 1086 owner; 20 pounds in 1066.
Owners 
Tenant-in-chief in 1086: Robert d'Oilly.
Lord in 1086: Ralph Basset.
Overlord in 1066: King Edward.
Lord in 1066: Brictric <of Waddesdon>.
Other information 
Phillimore reference: Buckinghamshire 19,4

memoryArtifacts.headline: Tiscott Domesday
memoryArtifacts.description:
Land of Robert d'Oilly
Households 
Households: 3.5 villagers. 2 freemen. 5 smallholders. 1 cottager. 1 slave.
Land and resources 
Ploughland: 4 ploughlands. 2 lord's plough teams. 2 men's plough teams.
Other resources: Meadow 3 ploughs. 1 mill, value 10 shillings.
Valuation 
Annual value to lord: 3 pounds 10 shillings in 1086; 4 pounds when acquired by the 1086 owner; 5 pounds in 1066.
Owners 
Tenant-in-chief in 1086: Robert d'Oilly.
Lord in 1086: Ralph Basset.
Overlords in 1066: Brictric <of Waddesdon>; Oswulf son of Frani; Edmer Ator.
Lords in 1066: Freeman, one; Freemen, two.
Other information 
Phillimore reference: Hertfordshire 19,1

popularStory.headline: B.      LORDS BASSET of DRAYTON BASSET, STAFFORDSHIRE - A Reference
popularStory.description: RALPH Basset, son of RICHARD Basset & his wife Matilda Ridel (-1160).  "Radulfus Basset filius Ricardi Basset" confirmed the donation of "terram de Niwebold…de feodo de Colestona" to Eynsham abbey mad …

zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset是Robert Basset和Mrs Robert Basset的兒子，於大約1076年出生在法國諾門迪奧內蒙崔易爾-奧-爾。他於1098年與Alice de Buci在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1110年被列為medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.。他去世於1127年11月20日在英國英格蘭波克夏阿炳頓享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset是Robert Basset和Mrs Robert Basset的儿子，于大约1076年出生在法国諾門迪奧內蒙崔易爾-奧-爾。他于1098年与Alice de Buci在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他于1110年被列为medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.。他去世于1127年11月20日在英国英格兰波克夏阿炳頓享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset was born about 1076, in Montreuil-au-Houlme, Orne, Normandy, France as the son of Robert Basset and Mrs Robert Basset. He married Alice de Buci in 1098, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. In 1110, at the age of 35, his occupation is listed as medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.. He died on 20 November 1127, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset est né environ 1076, à Montreuil-au-Houlme, Orne, Normandie, France, fils de Robert Basset et Mrs Robert Basset. Il a épousé Alice de Buci en 1098, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. En 1110, à l’âge de 35 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1127, à Abingdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset wurde um 1076 in Montreuil-au-Houlme, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Robert Basset und Mrs Robert Basset geboren. Er hat 1098 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Buci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. 1110, als er 35 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england. aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. November 1127 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset è nato il circa 1076 nel Montreuil-au-Houlme, Orne, Normandie, Francia come figlio di Robert Basset e Mrs Robert Basset. Lui sposato Alice de Buci nel 1098, nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Nel 1110, all'età di 35 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.. Morì il 20 novembre 1127, nel Abingdon, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Bassetは約1076年にフランスノーマンディオルンモントレウイル-アウ-hオウルメでRobert BassetとMrs Robert Bassetの息子として生まれた。1098年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットでAlice de Buciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。1110年，35歳の時，職業はmedieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.と記録されている。彼は1127年11月20日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset(은)는 대략 1076년 프랑스 노먼디 른 몽레우이-오-하에서 Robert Basset(와)과 Mrs Robert Basset의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 Alice de Buci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 1110년, 35세의 나이로 그의 직업은 medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.이었다. 그는 1127년 11월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 압잉던에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1076, em Montreuil-au-Houlme, Orne, Normandie, França filho de Robert Basset e Mrs Robert Basset. Ele casou-se com Alice de Buci em 1098, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Em 1110, com 35 anos, sua profissão aparece como medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england.. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1127, em Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset родился около 1076 г. в местности монтреуил-ау-хоулм, орн, норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Robert Basset и Mrs Robert Basset. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Buci в 1098 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. В 1110 году, в возрасте 35 лет,  он работал по профессии medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england. Он умер 20 ноября 1127 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

En 1110, a la edad de 35 años, su ocupación registrada era medieval english royal justice during the reign of king henry i of england..
